_note: Curated inputs for the Phase-8 bulk/block deals tracker (src/ingestion/deals_tracker.py). `marquee_names` are case-insensitive SUBSTRINGS matched against the disclosed client name — NSE spells the same investor many ways ('SBI MUTUAL FUND', 'SBI MF A/C ...'), so use the shortest distinctive fragment. A name here flags that deal as smart-money and folds into that ticker's marquee_net. `symbol_aliases` maps an NSE trading symbol to a project '.NS'/'.BO' ticker ONLY for the rare cases simple suffixing gets wrong; everything else defaults to <SYMBOL>.NS. Edit freely, no code change needed.
